transcript: Shen's troubled parents consulted a soothsayer. She foretold that if Shen continued down this dark path, he would be defeated by a warrior of black and white. The young lord set out to change his fate, but what he did next only sealed it. One often meets his destiny on the road he takes to avoid it. Shen returned to his parents full of pride, but in their faces he saw only horror. Good afternoon, gentlemen. Now we've got the pleasantries out of the way, please leave my house. Your house? Yes. Didn't you see the peacock on the front door? It seems your fortune-telling skills are not as good as you thought. We shall see, sir. Oh, you shall see, old goat. Where were we? Gongmen is under the stewardship of the Master's Council, and we will protect it even from you. I'm so glad you feel that way. Otherwise, I'd have dragged that here for nothing. What's in the box, Shen? You want to see? It's a gift. gift it's your party gift in that it will part you part of you here part of you there and part of you way over there staining the wall Show off. My father's throne. He used to let me play here beside him. Promising someday this throne would be mine. Greetings, Pounder. At last we meet. No, no, no, no, no, no. We meet at last. Yes, that's it. panda we meet a little to the left oh but it's so heavy master 30 years i've waited for this moment everything must be exactly how i envisioned it and i envisioned it a little to the left. Perfect. With the weapon by my sep- a little bit more. Lord Shet! I saw a panda! A panda! At last we meet. Oh boy, come on. Greetings, Pan. We at last meet. Yes! That's it. He arrives in chains. So, all is well. Yes, all is well. What do you mean, all is well? I'm simply simply agreeing with you but did you mean all as well from my point of view all is well from your point of view well well well well well Well, I guess that's it for this video, thanks for watching, and I'll see you in the next one. sort of evil janitor or something greetings spender we meet hey how you doing uh hey what's so funny the very thing that you clearly do not know I'll see's a guy. Whoa! The only reason you're still alive is that I find your stupidity mildly amusing. You, you were there. Yes, yes I was. Run, run! You idiot! Ow! The nose! Pull in the wolves, all of them! I want them ready to move! The Year of the Peacock begins now! Right now? Because it's the middle of the year, so you'd only get like a half of the Year of the Peacock. And this is the Year, of course, ofock happy new year sir get the wolves ready we're loading the ships now no no no no no no bring me everyone what do you mean everyone everyone WON! You just destroyed your ancestral home shed a trivial sacrifice when all of China is my reward then will you finally be satisfied will the subjugation of the whole world finally make you feel better As a start, I might also convert the basement into a dungeon. So your parents can rest in peace. My parents hated me. Do you understand? They wronged me. And I will make it right. They loved you. They loved you so much that having to send you away killed them. The dead exist in the past. And I must attend to the future. We killed them. Tell me what happened that night. What night? That night. Ah, that night. Yes. We're You're talking about the same night, right? no more running shan so it seems answers oh you want to know so badly you think knowing will heal you huh fill some crater in your soul well Well, here's your answer. Your parents didn't love you. But here, let me heal you. No! You roughly should have to be for your own flesh and blood, not to love you, even a little. Lord Shen, what about the bridge? Nothing stands in my way. Fire! Open it I have to kill the the same stinking panda? Shen, a panda stands between you and your destiny. What? Prepare yourself for a hot... What? Disc of Destruction! Okay. As you wish. Let's finish this. Again! Kill him! Somebody kill him! What? No! Keep firing! Keep firing! Keep firing! How did you how did you do it you know you just keep your elbows up and keep the shoulders loose how did you find peace i took away your parents everything i i I scarred you for life. Scars heal. No, they don't. Wounds heal. Oh, yeah. What do scars do? They fade, I guess? I don't care what scars do. You've got to let go of that stuff from the past, because it just doesn't't matter the only thing that matters is what you choose to be now you're right then i choose this Oh, my God. I'll see you next time.
